title: Geleceğin Teknolojisi: Kuantum Kriptolojisi (Cybersecurity and Post-Quantum Cryptology program)
description: BTK (Information and Communication Technologies Authority) news page on a program themed 'Cybersecurity and Post-Quantum Cryptology', opened by Transport and Infrastructure Minister Mehmet Cahit Turhan, Deputy Minister Omer Fatih Sayan and others; stresses the importance of spreading quantum-resistant cryptography algorithms and studies in Turkey.

title: Quantum Technologies - TÜBİTAK BİLGEM
description: TÜBİTAK BİLGEM page on its quantum technologies / quantum cryptography research. URL redirects to the BILGEM English homepage; explicit post-quantum cryptography text could not be confirmed.

title: Bilgem Teknoloji Dergi Sayı 9 (page 83) - TÜBİTAK BİLGEM
description: Page from TÜBİTAK BİLGEM's in-house technology magazine (Issue 9) surfaced under a post-quantum cryptography query; institutional publisher but a magazine article rather than a policy/standard document.

title: Siber Güvenlik Stratejisi ve Eylem Planı (Cyber Security Strategy and Action Plan)
description: BTK landing page for Turkey's National Cyber Security Strategy and Action Plan. General cyber strategy; no explicit post-quantum cryptography reference confirmed.

title: Bilişim Teknolojilerindeki Gelişmeler Işığında Kripto ... (TÜBA chapter)
description: Book chapter on cryptography published by TÜBA (Turkish Academy of Sciences). Academy publication, academic in nature; surfaced under cryptography queries.

title: TS 13638 / TS 13638-T2 - Türk Standardları Enstitüsü
description: TSE Turkish national standard TS 13638/T2. On inspection this standard covers penetration-testing personnel and firms (information security techniques), NOT post-quantum cryptography.
